name: Hello Friend
author: Djordje Atlialp (原版), Gridea Pro 社区（Jinja2 移植）
description: Minimal, clean, bilingual-ready personal blog theme. Jinja2 port of the Hugo hello-friend-ng theme by @rhazdon. Dark/light toggle, Inter font, Prism code highlighting.

customConfig.name: faviconPath
customConfig.label: Favicon
customConfig.note: 浏览器标签页图标；推荐 32×32 PNG / ICO

customConfig.name: logoImage
customConfig.label: Logo 图片
customConfig.note: 上传图片作为 Logo；若为空则使用下方的文字 Logo

customConfig.name: logoText
customConfig.label: Logo 文字
customConfig.note: 显示在左上角的 Logo 文字（未上传 Logo 图片时生效）

customConfig.name: logoMark
customConfig.label: Logo 符号
customConfig.note: Logo 文字前的符号，类似终端提示符

customConfig.name: logoCursorAnimate
customConfig.label: Logo 光标动画速度
customConfig.note: CSS 动画时长，如 2s；留空则使用主题默认

customConfig.name: logoCursorColor
customConfig.label: Logo 光标颜色
customConfig.note: CSS 颜色值，如 #67a2c9；留空则使用主题默认

customConfig.name: homeSubtitle
customConfig.label: 首页副标题
customConfig.note: 显示在首页个人卡片下方；可包含 HTML

customConfig.name: portraitPath
customConfig.label: 首页头像路径
customConfig.note: 圆形头像，展示在首页个人卡片顶部

customConfig.name: portraitAlt
customConfig.label: 头像 alt 文字
customConfig.note: 替代文字，供屏幕阅读器使用

customConfig.name: portraitMaxWidth
customConfig.label: 头像最大宽度
customConfig.note: CSS 单位，如 200px

customConfig.name: showLatestOnHome
customConfig.label: 首页显示最新文章列表
customConfig.note: 关闭后首页仅显示个人卡片

customConfig.name: defaultTheme
customConfig.label: 默认配色
customConfig.note: 访客首次访问时的默认配色

customConfig.name: backgroundImage
customConfig.label: 首页背景图
customConfig.note: 仅在首页生效；留空则为纯色背景

customConfig.name: socialGithub
customConfig.label: GitHub URL
customConfig.note: 完整 URL，留空则不显示

customConfig.name: socialEmail
customConfig.label: Email
customConfig.note: 不带 mailto: 前缀，模板会自动加

customConfig.name: socialRssUrl
customConfig.label: RSS URL
customConfig.note: 一般为 /atom.xml

customConfig.name: footerCopyright
customConfig.label: 页脚版权声明
customConfig.note: 如 © 2026 Your Name，留空不显示

customConfig.name: footerShowRss
customConfig.label: 页脚显示 RSS 图标

customConfig.name: footerBottomText
customConfig.label: 页脚底部文字
customConfig.note: 支持 HTML；用于备案号等

customConfig.name: customCss
customConfig.label: 自定义 CSS
customConfig.note: 追加到主样式后面

customConfig.name: customJs
customConfig.label: 自定义 JavaScript
customConfig.note: 追加到页面底部

customConfig.name: analyticsCode
customConfig.label: 分析代码（原样插入）
customConfig.note: 例如 Google Analytics、Plausible 等的完整 <script> 标签
